title: Results of astaxanthin and phycocyanin extraction from Synechococcus PCC11901 BC strain
author: Betterle, Nico
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Results of the extraction experiments on Synechococcus PCC11901 BC strain in the framework of the EIC-TRANSITION ASTEASIER project. Extractions were done by the University of Verona in collaboration with the company Sphera Encapsulation. Extraction efficiency and absoprtion spectra of extracts for astaxanthin (AX) and phycocyanin (PC) are reported
steps_raw: Results of the extraction experiments on Synechococcus PCC11901 BC strain in the framework of the EIC-TRANSITION ASTEASIER project. Extractions were done by the University of Verona in collaboration with the company Sphera Encapsulation. Extraction efficiency and absoprtion spectra of extracts for astaxanthin (AX) and phycocyanin (PC) are reported
